summary: Industrial Refrigeration Terminology Verification Complete. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The demo context has been successfully updated from generic terminology (Riverside, Warehouse, HVAC, Air Handling Unit, VFD Coolant Pump) to Industrial Refrigeration context (Dairy Processing Plant, Food Processing Facility, Screw Compressor, Evaporator Bank, Condenser Unit, Glycol Circulation Pump, compressor efficiency degradation, cooling drift, refrigeration load imbalance).
critical_code_review_comments: All demo seed endpoints correctly use Industrial Refrigeration terminology
Site names updated: 'Dairy Processing Plant — Refrigeration' and 'Food Processing Facility — Cold Storage'
Asset names updated: Screw Compressor, Evaporator Bank, Condenser Unit, Glycol Circulation Pump
Driver text updated: 'compressor efficiency degradation', 'refrigeration load imbalance', 'cooling drift'

IBA pipeline has 8 industrial sites with appropriate names (Dairy Processing, Meat & Poultry, Beverage Production, Frozen Foods, Chemical Processing, Glass Manufacturing, Pharmaceutical, Distribution Center)
Note: Internal site_id values (site-riverside, site-warehouse) are retained for database consistency - only display names were updated
Note: 'Pharmaceutical Plant — Clean Room HVAC' legitimately contains 'HVAC' as it's a valid industrial context
seed_data_creation: Demo seed endpoints /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes and /api/system/demo/seed-portfolio create Industrial Refrigeration context data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Industrial Refrigeration terminology verification complete. All 30 backend tests verify: (1) POST /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes returns 'Dairy Processing Plant — Refrigeration', 'Screw Compressor #1', 'Evaporator Bank 1', 'Condenser Unit 1', 'Glycol Circulation Pump', (2) POST /api/system/demo/seed-portfolio returns 'Food Processing Facility — Cold Storage', (3) GET /api/how/priorities shows refrigeration asset names and driver terminology, (4) GET /api/where/portfolio/intelligence shows correct site names, (5) GET /api/iba/refrigeration/analysis returns 8 industrial sites with correct names and RAMP connection showing 'Screw Compressor #2' and 'Glycol Circulation Pump', (6) GET /api/intelligence/outcomes shows 'Glycol Circulation Pump' with 'kWh/hr' savings unit. Frontend verified: Operator view shows ranked priorities with refrigeration assets, Portfolio view shows industrial site ranking and 'Compressor Efficiency Recovery' opportunity. No forbidden terms (Riverside Plant, Warehouse Distribution, Air Handling Unit, VFD Coolant, Rooftop Unit, Process Chiller) found in any endpoint or UI.
